channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The Sabar Rhythm: Senegalese Tradition Bringing Communities Together and Gaining Global Reach
item.description: The sabar is a vibrant cultural tradition from Senegal combining drumming, dance, and community celebration. It originates with the Wolof people and includes seven different drums, expressive dances, ...

item.title: Tanzania Football Federation Confirms Damaro Registration is Valid
item.description: The Tanzania Football Federation (TFF) has officially rejected a protest from Simba SC regarding the eligibility of Young Africans SC player, Mohammed Damaro Camara. Simba had claimed that Yanga broke...

item.title: Donald Trump criticises Keir Starmer and Emmanuel Macron over Middle East response
item.description: During a White House lunch, US President Donald Trump mocked British Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer over his reluctance to deploy British forces to the Middle East amid rising tensions in Iran. Mr Tr...

item.title: 2026 World Cup Final Tickets Reach Record Prices, Fans Express Concern
item.description: FIFA don dey face strong backlash globally after dem increase the ticket price for the 2026 World Cup final reach $10,990, the highest ever for football history. Originally, back in 2018, FIFA talk sa...

item.title: Marine Drones Transform Naval Warfare Following Conflicts in Ukraine and Iran
item.description: Recent conflicts in Ukraine and the ongoing tensions between the U.S., Israel, and Iran have accelerated the development and deployment of marine drones worldwide. British defence firm Kraken, for ins...

item.title: Iranian AI Videos Critiquing U.S. Cultural Influence
item.description: This article discusses the spread of videos produced by Iranians using artificial intelligence that critique U.S. cultural dominance, particularly symbolized by fast-food culture. The author highlight...

item.title: How Coffee Affects Mood and Mental Health
item.description: Coffee can provide a temporary boost in alertness and mood due to its caffeine content, which stimulates dopamine signalling in the brain. Studies suggest a link between coffee consumption and lower r...

item.title: Canada Revenue Agency Plans Workforce Reduction of 210 Positions
item.description: The Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) has announced plans to reduce its workforce by 210 positions over the coming months. The job cuts are part of broader operational changes aimed at improving efficiency ...

item.title: No Proof Dorcas Rigathi Will Run for Nyeri Governor in 2027
item.description: There’s a campaign poster circulating online suggesting that Dorcas Rigathi, who served as Kenya’s second lady from September 2022 to October 2024, intends to run for Nyeri governor in the 2027 electi...

item.title: Sydney man taken into custody after fatal stabbing in Emu Plains
item.description: A man has been taken into custody after another man was fatally stabbed in Emu Plains, a suburb of Sydney. The incident occurred early on April 3, 2026, and police promptly responded to the scene. Aut...

item.title: Unique Handbag Created Using Dinosaur Collagen
item.description: A recent development in the intersection of fashion and science has seen a designer use collagen extracted from dinosaur fossils to create a unique handbag. This innovative approach blends cutting-edg...

item.title: Proposed constitutional amendments in Zimbabwe could consolidate power and limit democratic processes
item.description: Zimbabwe’s ruling party, Zanu-PF, has introduced a bill proposing constitutional amendments that would extend presidential and parliamentary terms by two years. If passed, this would enable President ...

item.title: Ottawa Police Issue 36 Tickets in School Zone Safety Operation
item.description: Ottawa police conducted a safety blitz in school zones, issuing a total of 36 tickets to drivers who were found violating traffic rules. The operation aimed to enhance the safety of children and pedes...

item.title: Petrol and Diesel Prices Increased Amid Global Oil Price Surge
item.description: On Thursday, Petroleum Minister Ali Pervaiz Malik announced an increase in petrol and high-speed diesel prices, setting petrol at Rs458.4 per litre and HSD at Rs520.35 per litre. He spoke at a joint p...

item.title: Pakistan emphasises peace and warns against escalation with India
item.description: Pakistani Defence Minister Khawaja Asif has issued a stern reminder to his Indian counterpart, Rajnath Singh, stating that the notion of war between two nuclear-armed nations is completely unthinkable...

item.title: SpaceX and OpenAI IPOs Likely Offer Limited Gains for Public Investors
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX and AI companies like OpenAI and Anthropic are expected to launch massive initial public offerings (IPOs) in 2026, potentially raising billions and marking high-profile market event...

item.title: Adekunle Gold and Simi Celebrate Arrival of Second Child
item.description: Nigerian music stars Adekunle Gold and Simi don welcome their second pikin as Simi announce am on Instagram. The baby wey dem born on March 10, 2026, come dey mark another happy chapter for the couple...

item.title: Understanding the Role of Pentecostal Churches in Daily Life in Southern Africa
item.description: A recent study on Pentecostal churches in southern Africa challenges the common perception that these churches are primarily sites of strange miracles or sensational acts. While media often highlights...

item.title: NIA to Investigate Incident Where Judicial Officers Were Detained During Voter List Revision in Malda
item.description: In West Bengal's Malda district, a serious incident occurred during the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls. Seven judicial officers, including three women, were surrounded and...

item.title: Samburu Residents Protest Alleged Harassment of Governor Lati Lelelit by Senators
item.description: In Maralal Town, hundreds of Samburu residents staged a protest against senators who allegedly harassed Governor Lati Lelelit outside the Senate premises. The confrontation occurred when three senator...
